title: Frozen Waters
description: Players and boats will now freeze in the ocean!
body:
# Frozen Waters!

**Don't you just hate when you add special features to your modpack, and people just ignore them?**

Me too!  That is why I created Frozen Waters, the perfect datapack to dissuade the usage of boats or direct travel through large oceans!

Now, players will be more obligated to use new features you have added, such as the Small Ships mod!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KAw1F7xgUoA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Recommended to play with: https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships**

## Message "avaasusual." on Discord to report any issues please!
